data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for visibility controls and retention lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of visibility controls and retention lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not confirm that these elements are implemented or linked to any session interactions. The linked use case mentions the need for visibility controls and retention lifecycle, yet there are no prior steps or evidence that demonstrate their existence or functionality. This leads to an inconclusive result regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of visibility controls and retention lifecycle linked to session interaction events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
